structured_output.execution_summary: Baseline is release-closure-r3b: evaluation passed, delivery_complete and release_ready both true, 10/10 tests passing, MemoryComposerSheet wired into app target, runtime evidence present for denied-location/manual-picker/large-text flows, stale blackboard cleared. Next work is optional quality hardening — no emergency remediation required.
milestones: [UI] Capture dark-mode simulator screenshot and append to context_harness/reports/runtime_release_closure_evidence.md
[UI] Capture expanded bottom-sheet state screenshot and append to evidence bundle
[QA] Archive and prune stale reports in context_harness/reports/
[QA] Validate context_harness/reports/release_submission_packet_20260408.md references all runtime screenshot files; close final sign-off

logic: Record VoiceOver navigation walkthrough and update accessibility_readiness_20260408.md (ios_logic_builder)
qa: Archive and prune stale context_harness/reports/ entries (code_auditor)
Validate release_submission_packet_20260408.md and close final sign-off (code_auditor + hig_guardian)

structured_output.merge_strategy: UI and logic lanes commit directly to integration branch in parallel. QA lane holds final sign-off until both upstream lanes confirm completion. No new feature branches — all changes are evidence-only documentation updates. Merge is blocked if xcodebuild test drops below 10/10 or evaluation_summary.json loses passed: true.
structured_output.feedback_loop: QA reviews each evidence artifact as it lands in the integration branch. Any HIG or accessibility gap surfaced during VoiceOver walkthrough blocks the final sign-off until resolved by the logic lane. code_auditor posts a brief gate comment after each milestone completes; hig_guardian issues final release clearance once all five milestones are done.
